calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Nov-07-2014 Vacated

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jan-23-2014 Set For Trial On Dec-01-14 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-08-2014 Set For Trial On Aug-04-14 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

OBJECTION HEARING CALENDAR
Off Calendar Jan-22-2014 Off Calendar

MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Nov-01-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
DEFENDANT SERGIO ROMAN's MOTION TO STRIKE PORTIONS OF COMPLAINT - The Motion to Strike is granted with 10 days leave to amend for the plaintiff to plead, if he can do so in good faith, allegations supporting a punitive damages claim. Plaintiff has failed to plead the requisite malice under Civ. Code, 3294. (See Taylor v. Superior Court (1979) 24 Cal.3d 890.) ORDER SIGNED. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185 =(302/MJM)
